snapshot.title: Write briefing dialogue for all 4 character arcs
snapshot.description: Each character has a one-liner that plays before the daily puzzle — their briefing expression. Several chapters are missing these lines. Go through each of the 4 characters (Zix, Brix, Pip, The Cartographer) and write the missing ones. ~20-30 short lines total. Match each character's established voice and arc position.
